name: singularity-core
description: Singularity product core — edge package on top of OpenCode fork. Memory subsystem (Phase 2.1) + sessions table + SessionStore + MCP recall-sessions + get-session wrappers (Phase 2.2). Embedding adapter interface (Phase 2.3): provider-neutral EmbeddingAdapter + NoopEmbeddingAdapter default + FTS5 keyword search.

scripts.build: echo 'singularity-core is a library (noEmit: true); build is a no-op' && exit 0
